About Our Company
What We Do
We specialize in providing innovative solutions for the plastics industry. We are known for our patented MuCell® technology, which enables manufacturers to produce lightweight and high-performance plastic parts for industries such as automotive, footwear, packaging, industrial and consumer goods. Trexel's technology helps reduce material usage, improve product quality, and increase production efficiency. Additionally, we offer engineering services, training, and support to help our customers implement and optimize their plastic manufacturing processes.
Technology Evolution
Trexel is the exclusive provider of the MuCell
microcellular foam technology for injection molding and maintains an extensive global patent portfolio. Trexel provides world-class engineering support, training, and other design and processing services, as well as the equipment and components integral to the MuCell
process.
Global Manufacturing
Trexel’s headquarters are in Wilmington, MA, a suburb of Boston. In support of a global client base, Trexel has locations in Germany, and China with engineering, applications, and processing expertise. Trexel’s worldwide presence is augmented by a network of independent representatives and distributors.
Sustainability
MuCell
technology supports
susta
inability by promoting material efficiency, energy savings, recycling, and product durability. By adopting this technology, manufacturers can contribute
to e
nvironmental conservation and create more sustainable plastic products.
Material Reduction
Material Reduction
MuCell
technology allows manufacturers to produce lightweight plastic parts without compromising on strength or performance. By reducing the amount of material required to produce a part, MuCell technology helps in minimizing waste and optimizing resource utilization.
Energy Efficiency
Energy Efficiency
The use of MuCell
technology in plastic manufacturing can lead to energy savings. The technology enables faster cooling and shorter cycle times, which reduces energy consumption during the manufacturing process.
Environmental Impact
Environmental Impact
Lightweighting achieved through MuCell
technology helps in reducing fuel consumption in transportation. This, in turn, leads to lower carbon emissions and a reduced environmental impact.
Recycling
Recycling
MuCell
technology does not hinder the recyclability of plastic materials. The resulting plastic parts can be recycled and reused, contributing to a more circular economy and reducing the reliance on virgin materials.
Product Durability
Product Durability

about.text:
About Us - Trexel Inc.
Skip to content
About Us
About Us
Melanie Pine
2025-05-21T13:50:14+00:00
Trexel is in the business of providing technology which places tiny cells of gas in plastic parts, enabling lighter, more dimensionally stable products which can be produced on smaller, more energy-efficient equipment.
Trexel Technology Evolution
Microcellular foaming technology was originally conceptualized and invented at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) with work starting in 1979 under the supervision of Dr. Nam Suh. In 1995 Trexel was granted an exclusive worldwide license for the further development and commercialization of the technology.
Today, Trexel is the exclusive provider of the MuCell® microcellular foam technology for injection molding and maintains an extensive global patent portfolio. Trexel provides world-class engineering support, training, and other design and processing services, as well as the equipment and components integral to the MuCell® process.
Since 1995, Trexel has applied MuCell® to a variety of applications, it has developed industry-leading know-how and has experience foaming virtually every thermoplastic material family. Trexel’s equipment has evolved steadily as well, and the MuCell® solutions offered today benefit from 20+ years of experience.
Trexel also offers the TecoCell® line of chemical foaming products. TecoCell® products are uniquely formulated to provide excellent microcellular structures in an easy-to-implement additive.
Learn More About MuCell®
Learn More About TecoCell®
For more information on Industrial Lightweight Design, purchase the book, “
Physical Foam Injection Molding: Fundamentals for Industrial Lightweight Design
The Trexel Mission
To provide the molding industry with microcellular foaming solutions. We combine our industry-leading know-how with our innovative products to enable our customers to achieve their lightweight, quality, and/or cost targets.
The Trexel Vision
To enable our customers to make better, more sustainable products through our complete foaming solutions, from design to production.
Trexel Global Presence
Trexel’s headquarters are in Wilmington, MA, a suburb of Boston. In support of a global client base, Trexel operates subsidiaries in Germany, Japan, and China with engineering, applications, and processing expertise. Trexel’s worldwide subsidiaries are augmented by a network of competent independent representatives and distributors.
Let’s Make it Happen
Don’t hesitate to reach out to our global team.
We’re here to assist and provide you with answers to all of your inquires. Let’s take a look at your application and discuss whether our technology can help you reduce costs AND your carbon footprint. We are eager to guide you through the process. Get in touch today!
By Phone:
781-932-0202
By Email:
info@Trexel.com
